en.name: Level 67 — Bakery of Desire
en.shortDescription: A 1980s-style bakery that conjures items to match each visitor's tastes — its pastries hide dangerous, desire-tuned psychoactive effects.
en.atmosphere: A nostalgic yet unsettling bakery that adapts to your palate while masking lethal danger inside appealing confections.
en.tips: Never eat your favorite pastry — pick something neutral or disliked instead. Decide beforehand to avoid Faceling aggression in line.
